sources.title: Members of Parliament
sources.coverage_period: Current 54th Parliament member list; page reports 123 MPs across six parliamentary parties.
sources.reuse_note: Official Parliament page; record source URL and page facts before reuse. Do not infer historical membership beyond page coverage.
sources.access_constraints: Public web page; dynamic page structure may change.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before each derived member/party release and at least monthly during a parliamentary term.
coverage_gaps: Current page is not a complete historical member register.
Party changes and resignations require dated snapshots.

sources.title: Former Members of Parliament
sources.coverage_period: Historical former-member register with date ranges for parliamentary service.
sources.reuse_note: Use for historical member identity and service-period resolution. Preserve the page snapshot date when reusing the record.
sources.access_constraints: Public web page; dynamic listing may change as the site updates.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before member-identity releases and whenever historical service periods are rechecked.
coverage_gaps: Historical service periods should still be cross-checked against the roll-of-members PDF for durable provenance.

sources.title: Roll of members of the New Zealand House of Representatives, 1854 onwards
sources.coverage_period: Historical roll of members from 1854 onwards, including parliamentary service dates.
sources.reuse_note: Use as the durable historical member register for identity and service-period resolution. Preserve the downloaded PDF snapshot when reusing the record.
sources.access_constraints: Public PDF; update cadence follows Parliament's published roll revisions.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before historical member-identity releases and after any published roll update.
coverage_gaps: The roll is authoritative for historical service periods but is not a live membership feed.

sources.title: Contact an MP downloads
sources.coverage_period: Current member contact details, electorate/community offices, and email/contact downloads; page notes updates every few months.
sources.reuse_note: Use as supporting contact and office source, not as sole authority for identity resolution.
sources.access_constraints: Public web page with downloadable csv/xlsx/pdf files; file URLs and update dates change.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before any office/contact artifact publication.
coverage_gaps: Office data can lag post-election changes.
Not a full historical office-holder source.

sources.title: Parliamentary parties
sources.coverage_period: Current parliamentary parties represented in the 54th Parliament.
sources.reuse_note: Use for current parliamentary-party identities and party labels.
sources.access_constraints: Public web page; current-term only unless archived snapshots are retained.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before party-attribution releases and after any party status change.
coverage_gaps: Not a complete history of party aliases, splits, mergers, or dissolved parties.

sources.title: House seating plan
sources.coverage_period: Current House seating and caucus grouping snapshot.
sources.reuse_note: Use as supporting evidence for current seating/caucus display only.
sources.access_constraints: Public page; not a procedural or historical authority.
sources.refresh_cadence: When seating-sensitive visual or office-holder components are generated.
coverage_gaps: Does not prove historical seating or party membership over time.

sources.title: Bills (proposed laws)
sources.coverage_period: Current bills and bill-stage metadata; page states historical bills from 1854 to 2008 are available from NZLII.
sources.reuse_note: Use as the primary current bill source and link to stage/progress evidence.
sources.access_constraints: Public web app; Hansard links on Bills pages may lag during Parliament site changes.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before any bill, motion, or vote endpoint release.
coverage_gaps: Historical bills before 2009 require NZLII or other archive reconciliation.
Vote detail may require Hansard, Order Paper, or Daily Progress cross-checks.

sources.title: Hansard
sources.coverage_period: Official current Hansard website for debates and proceedings.
sources.reuse_note: Use for debate/proceeding text, sitting evidence, and vote/motion cross-references; do not use text-derived inference as member authority.
sources.access_constraints: Public web app; content may be JavaScript-rendered and requires retrieval tooling before automated hashing.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before sitting, speech-turn, motion, or vote artifact publication.
coverage_gaps: Existing source extract is document-level and does not by itself resolve speakers or parties.

sources.title: Order Paper
sources.coverage_period: Official agenda of Parliament, including scheduled business and upcoming debates.
sources.reuse_note: Use for planned sitting/business context; cross-check actual outcomes against Daily Progress and Hansard.
sources.access_constraints: Public page; current/forthcoming business can change before sitting.
sources.refresh_cadence: Daily during sitting weeks when generating sitting or proceeding components.
coverage_gaps: Planned business is not final outcome evidence.

sources.title: Daily progress in the House
sources.coverage_period: Official latest updates on parliamentary proceedings as they happen.
sources.reuse_note: Use as outcome/progress evidence for proceedings, bills, motions, and vote events.
sources.access_constraints: Public page; latest-progress orientation requires dated snapshots for reproducibility.
sources.refresh_cadence: Daily during sitting weeks before outcome-sensitive publication.
coverage_gaps: Historical reconstruction requires archived daily progress or Hansard reconciliation.

sources.title: Parliamentary Business
sources.coverage_period: Official hub for Daily Progress, Hansard, Journals, and Order Paper access.
sources.reuse_note: Use as the top-level Parliament business entrypoint and navigation source for official sitting/proceeding inventory discovery.
sources.access_constraints: Public page; links and page structure can change.
sources.refresh_cadence: Whenever the reconciliation inventory is refreshed.
coverage_gaps: Acts as an index rather than a complete historical ledger.

sources.title: Weekly Journals Archive
sources.coverage_period: Concise official record of House proceedings published by sitting week.
sources.reuse_note: Use for week-level reconciliation of sitting and proceeding records against the corpus extract.
sources.access_constraints: Public archive; week entries may be reorganized as new sittings are published.
sources.refresh_cadence: After each sitting week is published and before historical reconciliation runs.
coverage_gaps: The archive is weekly and may need page-level drill-down for exact sitting-day reconciliation.

sources.title: How to explore Hansard
sources.coverage_period: Official explanation of Hansard online coverage and publication stages.
sources.reuse_note: Use as supporting documentation for Hansard coverage boundaries, not as direct inventory authority.
sources.access_constraints: Public page; explanatory rather than structured data.
sources.refresh_cadence: When documentation or user-facing coverage language changes.
coverage_gaps: Does not enumerate the complete sitting ledger by itself.

sources.title: Written questions
sources.coverage_period: Official written questions and answers.
sources.reuse_note: Use as supporting evidence for ministerial responsibilities and parliamentary question procedure.
sources.access_constraints: Public web app; structured retrieval requires API or browser-aware tooling.
sources.refresh_cadence: When question-derived components are in scope.
coverage_gaps: Not a standalone member identity or party authority.

sources.title: Oral questions
sources.coverage_period: Official current oral questions listing.
sources.reuse_note: Use as supporting source for question-time components and procedure modeling.
sources.access_constraints: Public web app; current listing only unless snapshots are retained.
sources.refresh_cadence: During sitting weeks when question-time components are generated.
coverage_gaps: Must be reconciled to Hansard for answered text and final proceedings.

sources.title: Parliamentary Rules
sources.coverage_period: Current parliamentary rules and Standing Orders access point.
sources.reuse_note: Use for procedural model definitions before publishing procedure-derived fields.
sources.access_constraints: Public page; Standing Orders editions must be versioned when downloaded.
sources.refresh_cadence: Before procedure model releases and after Standing Orders amendments.
coverage_gaps: Rules explain procedure but do not identify individual vote outcomes.

sources.title: Historical bills from 1854 to 2008
sources.coverage_period: Historical bills where Parliament bills page points to NZLII for 1854 to 2008.
sources.reuse_note: Use only when official Parliament bill pages do not cover the historical period; record NZLII terms and source page per retrieved bill.
sources.access_constraints: Public archive; not the primary current Parliament source.
sources.refresh_cadence: When historical bill coverage is in scope.
coverage_gaps: Requires official/citation reconciliation before authoritative historical publication.

sources.title: Election results and electorate data
sources.coverage_period: Election result, electorate, and candidate context for parliamentary terms.
sources.reuse_note: Use for election result provenance and electorate context, not as sole proof of current parliamentary membership after term changes.
sources.access_constraints: Public website; result datasets must be separately versioned when downloaded.
sources.refresh_cadence: After elections, by-elections, electorate boundary changes, or when term-level member components are generated.
coverage_gaps: Does not capture all mid-term parliamentary changes without Parliament sources.

sources.title: Bills API (REST)
sources.coverage_period: Parliaments 44-54 (1996-present), 3,513 bill records with structured stages, members, committees.
sources.access_constraints: Open REST API with JSON responses. Key endpoints: /api/data/Bill/{uuid}, /api/data/search (POST), /api/data/facet (POST), /api/data/currentParliament, /rss?set=Bills.
sources.refresh_cadence: Near real-time; reflects current parliamentary activity.
coverage_gaps: API provides bill metadata and parliamentary stages, not full Hansard debate text.
Historical bills before Parliament 44 not present in this system.

sources.title: HathiTrust NZ Parliamentary Debates Collection
sources.publisher: HathiTrust Digital Library / University of California
sources.coverage_period: NZ Parliamentary Debates (Hansard) historic volumes from 1854 to 1990. 510 full-view items covering approximately Parliaments 1-46.
sources.access_constraints: HathiTrust OAuth API for full-text; bibliographic metadata via catalog API. Collection ID: 71329709. Full view items available in public domain.
sources.refresh_cadence: Static collection; HathiTrust adds new items as digitisation completes.
coverage_gaps: Coverage ends around 1990; does not overlap with post-1990 period covered by DocumentsDB extract.
OCR quality varies for older volumes.
Requires OAuth token for bulk full-text retrieval.

sources.title: Wikipedia New Zealand Parliament articles
sources.coverage_period: 47th-54th Parliaments (2002-2026). Each article lists all MPs with party and electorate.
sources.access_constraints: Open web pages. Wikipedia API also available for structured data extraction.
sources.refresh_cadence: Updated manually by Wikipedia editors; check before each member identity release.
coverage_gaps: Not an official primary source; accuracy depends on Wikipedia editorial quality.
Parliaments before 47th are not covered by the curated list in this repository.

sources.title: Wikidata New Zealand MPs
sources.coverage_period: 1,514 MP records from 1st Parliament to present. Includes aliases, provenance references, and parliamentary service dates.
sources.access_constraints: Open SPARQL endpoint. Query uses P39 (Member of NZ Parliament) and P463 (member of NZ House of Representatives).
sources.refresh_cadence: Updated continuously by Wikidata community.
coverage_gaps: Recent 54th Parliament MPs may lack P39 property entries.
Provenance reference URLs point to primary sources but are not always complete.
Party labels follow Wikidata conventions which may differ from official names.

sources.title: Electoral Commission New Zealand
sources.coverage_period: Election results, electorate data, and candidate lists for all general elections from 1853 onwards.
sources.access_constraints: Public website with downloadable datasets. Historical election results available in structured formats.
sources.refresh_cadence: After each general election and by-election.
coverage_gaps: Candidate lists are election-specific; mid-term membership changes require Parliament sources.
Historical data may need additional digitisation or reconciliation.

members.notes: Current MP identity starts from the official Parliament members list; historical service periods are resolved from the former-members page and roll-of-members PDF. Contact and election sources are supporting.

parties.notes: Current parliamentary party labels come from Parliament; historical party attribution needs term snapshots.

offices.notes: Office/contact fields need dated downloadable files and should not drive identity alone.

sittings.notes: Actual sitting/proceeding components need Hansard and daily progress readback.

bills.notes: Current bill metadata starts from Parliament; 1854-2008 historical bills require NZLII reconciliation.

motions.notes: Motions require proceeding text, planned business, actual progress, and rules context.

votes.notes: Vote events require Hansard/daily progress and bill-stage cross-checks; party/individual vote components must cite source IDs.

procedure.notes: Procedure model must cite rules plus proceeding/question sources before derived procedure fields are published.
